    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    G

    generateConfirmationCode() - Method in class logicControllers.ReservationController
    Generates a random 6-digit confirmation code for a reservation.
    generateConfirmationCode() - Method in class logicControllers.WaitingListController
    Generates a 6-digit confirmation code and ensures it is unique within the current waiting list.
    generatedAt - Variable in class Entities.Report
    Timestamp when the report was generated.
    generateGuestId() - Method in class Controllers.GuestMakeReservationController
    Generates a random guest ID between 10000 and 20000.
    generateRandomAmount() - Method in class commands.PayCommand
    Generates a random bill amount for simulation purposes.
    generateRandomAmount() - Method in class logicControllers.DailyFunctionController
     
    generateRandomUserId2() - Method in class DAO.UserDAO
    Generates a unique 6-digit user ID and verifies it doesn't already exist.
    generateReportData(LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class logicControllers.SubscribesReportController
    Generates weekly report data for the given type between start and end dates.
    generateReportData(LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class logicControllers.TimeReportController
    Fetches raw time-related data for reservations within a specific date range. * @param start The start date of the report period.
    generateSlots() - Method in class handlers.ReportHandler
    Generates all half-hour time slots between 08:00 and 02:30.
    generateUniqueGuestId() - Method in class Controllers.GuestMakeReservationController
    Generates a unique guest ID.

    getAffectedReservations(int, int, boolean) - Method in class DAO.TableDAO
    Identifies reservations assigned to a specific table that can no longer exist due to table deletion or a reduction in seating capacity. * @param tableId The ID of the modified table.

    Requests all reservations
